title: Default Hd 32x32
description: This project is Default Hd but 16x16 to reduce lag but also make it more beatufil than normal minecraft
body:
Default HD is the normal Minecraft experience but in amazing 32x HD. This pack is different from the rest with its low lag but still great look.

I originally created this pack as there was no real or definitive default experience in HD without much lag. This keeps the original style and pixels, just shaded and in HD.

This is the demo/alpha version of the 32x version of the pack. It has a handful of textures at the 32x resolution for you to test out and see!We tested the fps differnce and with 64x we got 150 fps with 5080 Ram and with 32x we got 350 fps still with 5080 Ram.
